title: BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS - 211info
text: OREGON BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists the public by identifying and regulating the practice of licensed professional counselors and licensed marriage and family therapists. Investigates complaints regarding violations of the law and rules, and the competency of licensees. Issues new and renewed licenses, disciplines misconduct, and communicates information about licensure, practice, and discipline. Develops and maintains professional standards for the professions of professional counseling and marriage and family therapy. 3218 Pringle Road SE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-5499 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-5499 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None for general public. Practitioner license application and renewal fees vary. DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Occupational/Professional Licensing and Certification * Mental Health Counselors Practitioner Complaints If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS
